title: chizzayown #2384
definition:
1) vision
    1a) vision (in the ecstatic state)
        1a1) valley of vision (perhaps fig. of Jerusalem or Hinnom)
    1b) vision (in the night)
    1c) vision, oracle, prophecy (in divine communication)
